attacking_style: Targets intermediate climbs and early breakaways for KOM points rather than summit finishes. When stage hunting, attacks with 3-6km remaining, exploiting steep early gradients or descent positioning rather than sustained climbing power.
team_tactics: Often operates independently in breakaways with minimal domestique support. Trek gives freedom to hunt KOM points opportunistically, even at expense of break cohesion. Not consistently protected for GC or stage wins.
terrain_preference: Steep early gradients on medium-length climbs (under 25km) where explosive power matters more than sustained watts. Strong descender. Exposed on extended gravel sections and marathon mountain stages requiring sustained elite pace.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain pace with top GC contenders on long climbs. Goes backwards when forced to follow extended attacks. Struggles on gravel when gradients remain high for 30+ minutes. Positioning errors lead to crash involvement.
key_patterns: Dominates KOM classification through intermediate climbs and tactical point collection, not summit finishes (5 observations)
Attacks early on climbs (3-6km or 500m to go), rarely sustained long-range efforts (4 observations)
Prioritizes jersey competitions over stage wins, attacking for points even when compromising breakaway (6 observations)
Breaks away early (30-40km out) then exploits steep sections to split groups (3 observations)
Shows resilience winning alone after teammates drop, operates independently in reduced groups (3 observations)
Form deteriorates on extended GC efforts; loses contact with elite climbers on long ascents (4 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Won 2023 Tour KOM jersey through tactical maturity, plus Dauphine stage win using descending skills. Resurgent after 2021-22 slump, now optimized for classification hunting over GC.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 16
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17
